analysis.analysis: Critical shortages of Heparin have been detected across multiple Indian hospitals, with the shortest remaining supply at Fortis Mumbai (1.5 days).

ranked_disruptions.clinical_risk: Patients may experience severe bleeding or heart complications if not treated with Heparin in time.
Patients may face increased risk of bleeding and heart complications if Heparin is not available.
Patients may experience delayed or inadequate treatment for bleeding and heart conditions if Heparin is not available.
